---
title: "The Impact of Agency Policies on the Level of Force Used by Officers"
categories: ["Quantitative Analysis"]
date: "2025-03-19"
image: "../images/sample_screenshot.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---
<iframe src="../sample_agency_policies.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it.
</iframe>
